'''âv-t-k''' ('''kavatak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jitter|jitter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jitter|jitter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavatak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivatak|thivatak]] || [[word:jivatak|jivatak]] || [[word:shivatak|shivatak]] || [[word:kivatak|kivatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvatak|thuthuvatak]] || [[word:jujuvatak|jujuvatak]] || [[word:shushuvatak|shushuvatak]] || [[word:kukuvatak|kukuvatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvatak|thuvatak]] || [[word:juvatak|juvatak]] || [[word:shuvatak|shuvatak]] || [[word:kuvatak|kuvatak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvatak|thuvatak]] || [[word:juvatak|juvatak]] || [[word:shuvatak|shuvatak]] || [[word:kuvatak|kuvatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevatak|thevatak]] || [[word:jevatak|jevatak]] || [[word:shevatak|shevatak]] || [[word:kevatak|kevatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovatak|thothovatak]] || [[word:jojovatak|jojovatak]] || [[word:shoshovatak|shoshovatak]] || [[word:kokovatak|kokovatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovatak|thovatak]] || [[word:jovatak|jovatak]] || [[word:shovatak|shovatak]] || [[word:kovatak|kovatak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovatak|thovatak]] || [[word:jovatak|jovatak]] || [[word:shovatak|shovatak]] || [[word:kovatak|kovatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvatak|thĂŠvatak]] || [[word:jĂŠvatak|jĂŠvatak]] || [[word:shĂŠvatak|shĂŠvatak]] || [[word:kĂŠvatak|kĂŠvatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavatak|thathavatak]] || [[word:jajavatak|jajavatak]] || [[word:shashavatak|shashavatak]] || [[word:kakavatak|kakavatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatak|thavatak]] || [[word:javatak|javatak]] || [[word:shavatak|shavatak]] || [[word:kavatak|kavatak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatak|thavatak]] || [[word:javatak|javatak]] || [[word:shavatak|shavatak]] || [[word:kavatak|kavatak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavatak|shavatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavatak|goshavatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavatak|gokishavatak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavataknĂŒ|shavataknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavataknknĂŒ|goshavataknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavataknĂŒ|gokishavataknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavatakshĂ«|shavatakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavataknkshĂ«|goshavataknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavatakshĂ«|gokishavatakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavatakro|shavatakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataknkro|goshavataknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavatakro|gokishavatakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatakmu|shavatakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataknkmu|goshavataknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatakmu|gokishavatakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavataksher|shavataksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavataknksher|goshavataknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavataksher|gokishavataksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavatakng|shavatakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavataknkng|goshavataknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavatakng|gokishavatakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavatakya|shavatakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavataknkya|goshavataknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavatakya|gokishavatakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavatakyam|shavatakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavataknkyam|goshavataknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavatakyam|gokishavatakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavataknĂŒshĂ«|shavataknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataknknĂŒshĂ«|goshavataknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavataknĂŒshĂ«|gokishavataknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavataknĂŒro|shavataknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataknknĂŒro|goshavataknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavataknĂŒro|gokishavataknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavataknĂŒmu|shavataknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataknknĂŒmu|goshavataknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavataknĂŒmu|gokishavataknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavatakshĂ«nĂŒ|shavatakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavataknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavatakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavatakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavatakshĂ«ro|shavatakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataknkshĂ«ro|goshavataknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavatakshĂ«ro|gokishavatakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatakshĂ«mu|shavatakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataknkshĂ«mu|goshavataknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatakshĂ«mu|gokishavatakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavatakronĂŒ|shavatakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataknkronĂŒ|goshavataknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavatakronĂŒ|gokishavatakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavatakroshĂ«|shavatakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataknkroshĂ«|goshavataknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavatakroshĂ«|gokishavatakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatakromu|shavatakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataknkromu|goshavataknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatakromu|gokishavatakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavatakmunĂŒ|shavatakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataknkmunĂŒ|goshavataknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavatakmunĂŒ|gokishavatakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavatakmushĂ«|shavatakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataknkmushĂ«|goshavataknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavatakmushĂ«|gokishavatakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavatakmuro|shavatakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataknkmuro|goshavataknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavatakmuro|gokishavatakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
